title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
